sections.paragraph:
Original: זבל

Transliteration: zebûl

Phonetic: zeb-ool'

BDB Definition:

Zebul = "exalted"
  1. chief man of the city of Shechem at the time of the contest between Abimelech and the native Canaanites

Origin: the same as H2073

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
